sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';

/**
 * HourStack logo — C2 Electric Green neon style.
 * Glowing green rings with a yellow sweep hand on a dark face.
 */
export default function HourStackLogo({ size = 38 }) {
  return (
    <svg
      width={size}
      height={size}
      viewBox="0 0 48 48"
      fill="none"
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
      aria-label="HourStack logo"
    >
      <defs>
        <filter id="hs-glow">
          <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2.5" result="blur" />
          <feMerge>
            <feMergeNode in="blur" />
            <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic" />
          </feMerge>
        </filter>
      </defs>

      {/* Outer dashed orbit ring */}
      <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="21"
        stroke="#00ff88" strokeWidth="1"
        strokeDasharray="4 3" fill="none"
        opacity="0.25" filter="url(#hs-glow)" />

      {/* Main glowing ring */}
      <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="17"
        stroke="#00ff88" strokeWidth="2.5"
        fill="rgba(0,255,136,0.05)"
        filter="url(#hs-glow)" />

      {/* Inner clock face */}
      <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="11"
        fill="#050f08" stroke="#00ff88" strokeWidth="0.8" />

      {/* 4 cardinal hour markers */}
      <circle cx="24" cy="8"  r="1.2" fill="#00ff88" opacity="0.85" />
      <circle cx="24" cy="40" r="1.2" fill="#00ff88" opacity="0.85" />
      <circle cx="8"  cy="24" r="1.2" fill="#00ff88" opacity="0.85" />
      <circle cx="40" cy="24" r="1.2" fill="#00ff88" opacity="0.85" />

      {/* Hour hand (~10) */}
      <line x1="24" y1="24" x2="20" y2="16"
        stroke="#00ff88" strokeWidth="2.2" strokeLinecap="round"
        filter="url(#hs-glow)" />

      {/* Minute hand (~2) */}
      <line x1="24" y1="24" x2="30" y2="20"
        stroke="#00ff88" strokeWidth="1.6" strokeLinecap="round"
        filter="url(#hs-glow)" />

      {/* Second / sweep hand — yellow accent */}
      <line x1="24" y1="24" x2="24" y2="33"
        stroke="#fff000" strokeWidth="1.2" strokeLinecap="round"
        filter="url(#hs-glow)" />

      {/* Centre dot */}
      <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="1.6" fill="#00ff88" filter="url(#hs-glow)" />
      <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="0.7" fill="#050f08" />
    </svg>
  );
}
